2606.25753.title: Gradient-based inverse lithography for EUV masks via the waveguide method and a physics-informed neural operator
2606.25753.paper_summary: Gradient-based inverse lithography technology~(ILT) for extreme ultraviolet~(EUV) masks is presented. A novel framework treats the differentiable waveguide method and the recently proposed waveguide neural operator~(WGNO) as end-to-end physics engines, recovering the permittivity of the absorber of the mask through automatic differentiation of the full forward diffraction model. Numerical experiments on realistic 2D and 3D absorbers of the mask (TaBN, La, U) at $λ{=}11.2$~nm show that the considered ILT methods make it possible to obtain a mask structure that achieves the desired field on the wafer.
2606.25753.paper_summary_zh: 基於梯度的反向光刻技術~(ILT) 用於極紫外線~(EUV) 掩模。提出了一個新穎的框架，將可微分波導方法和最近提出的波導神經運算子~(WGNO) 作為端到端的物理引擎，通過對完整前向衍射模型的自動微分來恢復掩模吸收體的介電常數。在 $λ{=}11.2$~nm 的現實 2D 和 3D 掩模吸收體 (TaBN, La, U) 上的數值實驗表明，所考慮的 ILT 方法使得獲得一種能在晶圓上實現所需場的掩模結構成為可能。
2606.25753.author: Vasiliy A. Es'kin et.al.
2606.25753.authors: Vasiliy A. Es'kin, Egor V. Ivanov
